items.claim: Bogdan Guskov had a training camp for the fight, though his preparation was cut short by a week.
items.quote: Gushkov just got cut a week short. Still had a lot of time to train.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is an undefeated fighter and primarily a wrestler who struck a lot more in his last fight.
items.quote: Undefeated fighter, very good. He struck a lot more in his last fight, but mostly a wrestler.

items.claim: Brendt Prates is on a three-fight losing streak.
items.quote: He's on a three loss streak

items.claim: Wellington Turman is coming off three losses in a row and has not won a fight since 2022.
items.quote: coming off three losses in a row, has not won a fight since 2022.

items.claim: Damian Zabeski has secured some good knockouts lately.
items.quote: Zabeski's got some good knockouts lately.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is more of a technician in his fights.
items.quote: Uncle is more of a technician.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov has knockout potential and tries to create a highlight reel every chance he gets.
items.quote: Gushkov has that knockoff potential. Tries to create a highlight reel every chance he gets.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off a two-fight losing streak with both losses by finish.
items.quote: Gibson coming off a two loss streak, both finishes.

items.claim: Cody Gibson leaves himself open with his hands down and chin in the air, being reckless with his defense.
items.quote: he just leaves himself open a lot. Hands are down, chin in the air. Very reckless with his defense.
